MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF JAMES WATSON'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complaint IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189. (301/PJB)
